title: A Doctor's Diary
writer: Joseph Anthony, Samuel Ornitz, David Boehm
actors: George Bancroft, Helen Burgess, John Trent
plot: Dr. Daniel Norris, resident physician at Stanwood Hospital, is engaged to the president's daughter, Catherine Stanwood. He has been diligently experimenting to find a cure for polio and neglects his fiance because of this. When he...
